article_meta.title: Iranians block a street during a protest in Tehran, Iran on 9 January 2026

reasoning: One clear attribution violation by flagging a quoted source statement, a questionable Bias by Omission claim tied to non-biased text, and multiple missed author-level bias instances; only one strong, correctly attributed catch.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged a quoted line (“This appears to be a deliberate revenge campaign…”) as author bias, violating the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Two of four items are clearly wrong: a quoted statement treated as author bias and a misapplied Bias by Omission tied to a neutral sentence; one item is borderline (video caption).
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed notable author-prose bias: the causal claim 'Doctors are being arrested… for helping save the lives…' (mind reading/opinion as fact), endorsement 'whose figures have been reliable…' (opinion as fact), and loaded 'anti-regime' word choice.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Label for 'brutal crackdown' is appropriate; 'Sensationalism' for the video caption is arguable; 'Bias by Omission' was misapplied; treating a sourced quote as 'Opinion Presented as Fact' is incorrect.
